Part.Source:
//EMpCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpLctCod, CImpOriUfeCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod, CImpDtaIni
For Each ORder EmpCod, LctCod &EmpCod = EmpCod &LctCod = LctBasImpCod
if LctClsCST.IsEmpty() or LctClsCST.IsNull() do 'getTabela'
if not &LctClsCST.IsEmpty() LctClsCST = &LctClsCST LctClsTrib = &LctClsTrib LctClsTribFix = &LCtClsTribFix Endif
Commit Endif
EndFor
Sub 'getTabela' &LctClsCST = '' &LctClsTrib = '' &LCtClsTribFix = false &CImpCfoCod = ''
For Each ORder EmpCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpLctCod, CImpOriUfeCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod, (CImpDtaIni) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = CImpDstUfeCod Where CImpLctCod = &LctCod
&CImpCfoCod = CImpCfoCod
Exit When None For Each ORder EmpCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpLctCod, CImpOriUfeCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod, (CImpDtaIni) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = 'EX' Where CImpLctCod = &LctCod
&CImpCfoCod = CImpCfoCod
Exit when none For Each ORder EmpCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpLctCod, CImpOriUfeCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod, (CImpDtaIni) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpOriUfeCod <> CImpDstUfeCod Where CImpLctCod = &LctCod
&CImpCfoCod = CImpCfoCod Exit EndFor EndFor EndFor
Do CAse CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.101','5.102','5.103','5.104','5.105','5.106','5.111','5.112','5.113','5.114','5.115','5.116','5.117','5.118','5.119','5.120','5.122','5.123','5.401','5.402','5.403','5.405') //VENDA NORMAL &LctClsCST = '000' &LctClsTrib = '000001' &LCtClsTribFix = false
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.109','5.110') //"VENDA DE PRODUÇÃO PRÓPRIA OU DE TERCEIROS PARA ZFM", &LctClsCST = '200' &LctClsTrib = '200022' &LCtClsTribFix = true
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.124','5.125') // "INDUSTRIALIZAÇÃO EFETUADA PARA OUTRA EMPRESA", &LctClsCST = '000' &LctClsTrib = '000001' &LCtClsTribFix = false
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.151','5.152','5.153','5.155','5.156','5.408','5.409') //"TRANSFERÊNCIA PRÓPRIAS", &LctClsCST = '410' &LctClsTrib = '410002' &LCtClsTribFix = true
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.201','5.202','5.205','5.206','5.207','5.208','5.209','5.210','5.410','5.411','5.412','5.413') //"DEVOLUÇÃO DE COMPRAS E VENDAS &LctClsCST = '000' &LctClsTrib = '000001' &LCtClsTribFix = false
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.351','5.352','5.353','5.354','5.355','5.356','5.357','5.359','5.360') //"PRESTAÇÃO DE SERVIÇOS DE TRANSPORTE", &LctClsCST = '000' &LctClsTrib = '000001' &LCtClsTribFix = true
Case &CImpCfoCod = '7.101' //REMESSA DE PRODUÇÃO PRÓPRIA OU DE TERCEIRO PARA VENDA EXTERNA" &LctClsCST = '410' &LctClsTrib = '410999' &LCtClsTribFix = true
CAse &CImpCfoCod in ('5.414', '5.415', '5.901','5.902','5.903','5.904','5.905','5.906','5.907','5.908','5.909','5.912','5.913','5.914','5.915','5.916','5.918','5.919','5.920','5.921','5.922','5.923','5.924','5.925','5.926','5.927','5.928','5.929','5.931','5.932','5.933','5.934','5.949') //REMESSA DE PRODUÇÃO PRÓPRIA OU DE TERCEIRO PARA VENDA EXTERNA" &LctClsCST = '410' &LctClsTrib = '410999' &LCtClsTribFix = true
CAse &CImpCfoCod = '5.910' //BONIFICACAO &LctClsCST = '410' &LctClsTrib = '410001' &LCtClsTribFix = true
CAse &CImpCfoCod = '5.911' //AMOSTRA GRATIS &LctClsCST = '410' &LctClsTrib = '410003' &LCtClsTribFix = true
EndCase
EndSub
